scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm exec tsc --build --force && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/crypto-dashboard run build && node scripts/vercel-stage-public.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/crypto-dashboard run dev
